prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7740→6967→6751→9460→9966，2024年因新高考改革科类划分调整位次明显后移，2025年继续后移至约9966名，近两年累计后移约32 15名，呈持续后移趋势；该校在安徽省物理类计划2021年55人、2022年51人、2023年59人、2024年70人、2025年67人；2026年计划58人，较2025年缩招约 13.4%，缩招幅度较大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，山东大学（威海）共享山东大学软科主榜排名约第22名，近年排名稳定，学校层次高；数学A+、中国语言文 学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A、法学A-、应用经济学A-、物理学A-等，数学为王牌学科；2026年声誉评价偏负面（山东大学学伴事件遗留舆情），但抖音热度排名第20（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度仍较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，数学/统计推荐；本省2026年考生总数约45.1万，较2025年约46.2万略有下降，竞争压力略有缓解；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，对安徽省考生属跨省报考，无明显地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划大幅缩招（-13.4% ）及本省考生总数略降，缩招对位次前移的拉动作用大于考生减少的缓解效应；学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热，关注度不减。在2025年基准9966名基础上，预测最低位次约9133名， 区间8633–9633名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7740 → 6967 → 6751 → 9460 → 9966. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and adjustment of subject category divisions, the ranking significantly shifted backward, and in 2025 it continued to shift backward to about 9966, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3215 places over the past two years, showing a continuous backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 55 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 58, a reduction of about 13.4% compared to 2025, a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Shandong University (Weihai) shares the main ranking of Shandong University on the Soft Science Ranking, approximately 22nd, with stable rankings in recent years and a high university level. Mathematics is A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Physics A-, etc., with mathematics as the flagship discipline. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (residual public opinion from the Shandong University study partner incident), but the Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, so application attention remains high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, and Mathematics/Statistics are also recommended. The total number of examinees in this province in 2026 is about 451,000, a slight decrease from about 462,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is a cross-province application for Anhui Province examinees, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-13.4%), and the slight decrease in the total number of examinees in this province, the pulling effect of the enrollment reduction on ranking advancement is greater than the easing effect of the decrease in examinees. The university's reputation is somewhat negative but has high Douyin popularity, so attention remains undiminished. Based on the 2025 baseline of 9966, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9133, with a range of 8633–9633.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (including Physics)
- Marine Science (including Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (including Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8633–9633, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8600), you can focus on sprinting for top-tier majors such as Electronic Information or Mathematics.
